## Verification

- [ ] `./gradlew verify`

## Definition of Done

- [ ] Tests added or updated, or not applicable because:
- [ ] Settings/default behaviour considered for user-facing changes.
- [ ] Accessibility, reduced motion, and permission impacts considered.
- [ ] Performance impact considered.
- [ ] Migration/persistence impact considered.
- [ ] Manual Android validation documented when local tests cannot cover the behaviour.
